name: Crusty Lamb Con Ajo
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the garlic cloves and remove their skins.
2. Place the garlic, parsley, and oil in a blender or food processor. Mix until a paste is formed.
3. Remove excess fat from the leg of lamb.
4. Spread the garlic mixture evenly on all sides of the meat.
5. Bake the meat uncovered at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes per pound. The garlic mixture can also be used on other cuts of meat.
